realistic.desc: Launch → Bull → Crash → Recovery → Mature bull

early_crash.desc: Honeymoon → Hard crash year 1 → Long recovery

v_recovery.desc: Bull → violent crash → sharp V recovery → sustained bull

double_bull.desc: Two separate bull runs with a bear in between

bootstrapped.desc: Tiny start (100 users) + viral growth mid-way

late_adopter_crash.desc: Large ecosystem (5k users) hit by sudden extended bear
